steps.title: Identify the sides
steps.content: $\tan X = \dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{adjacent}}$. From the figure (a 3-4-5 right triangle with the right angle opposite the hypotenuse 5), the side opposite angle $X$ has length $3$ and the adjacent side has length $4$.

steps.title: Compute tan X
steps.content:
$$\tan X = \frac{3}{4}$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
